maximum_surface_area: Modifications are strictly limited to updating the global `SigLevel` in the root `pacman.conf` to `Required DatabaseOptional`. Official repositories (`[core]`, `[extra]`, `[multilib]`) must maintain their explicit overrides to `Required DatabaseRequired`.
constraints: Change only the global `SigLevel` line in the root `pacman.conf`.
Do not modify `airootfs/etc/pacman.conf` (the installed system's configuration).
